missing_user_requirements: implementation scripts were absent before round 1 patch
latest_patch_summary: Round 4 corrected Claude Code apt repository setup, added bridge service enable/start behavior, core-ready validation script, real provider smoke checks outside dry-run, Mattermost HTTP health check, one-time bridge secret display for pairing, REST fallback for /ai slash command and webhook creation, and lightweight provider capability probes. Fresh review is still required before lowering open issue counts.
